name: Roasted Red Pepper Cheese Mousse in Croustades
recipeIngredient: 2 red bell peppers (peel and discard skins, stems, and seeds)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove and discard the skins, stems, and seeds from the roasted peppers.
2. Combine the peppers, cream cheese, and garlic in a food processor.
3. Process until smooth.
4. Add olive oil to the food processor while it is running, then process until well mixed.
5. Season with salt and white pepper to taste.
6. Cover and chill for 4-96 hours.
7. Cut the bread into 2-1/2 inch rounds using a cutter.
8. Heat butter or oil in a skillet over medium heat.
9. Add garlic and remove from heat, allowing it to stand for 4-5 minutes until fragrant.
10. Flatten the bread rounds with a rolling pin.
11. Coat each round with the garlic mixture.
12. Press into a mini muffin pan.
13. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 10-15 minutes, or until very crisp.
14. Remove from oven and allow to cool completely.
15. Fill the croustades with the cheese mousse using a piping bag.
16. Garnish as desired.
17. Serve at room temperature.
